headline: India's GDP grows at 7.2% in Q3 2024
description: India's economy expanded by 7.2% in the third quarter of 2024 driven by strong manufacturing and services sector growth

headline: PM Modi launches new infrastructure initiative worth Rs 10 lakh crore
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated a major infrastructure push targeting roads highways and railways across rural India

headline: RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 6.5% in latest monetary policy review
description: The Reserve Bank of India maintained the benchmark repo rate at 6.5% citing inflation control and economic stability

headline: India beats Pakistan in ICC Champions Trophy final by 6 wickets
description: Team India secured a dominant victory over Pakistan in the ICC Champions Trophy final held in Dubai

headline: ISRO successfully launches PSLV-C58 mission with Earth observation satellite
description: Indian Space Research Organisation achieved another milestone by successfully launching PSLV-C58 carrying a new Earth observation satellite

headline: Supreme Court upholds validity of new citizenship amendment rules
description: The Supreme Court of India in a landmark judgment upheld the constitutional validity of the Citizenship Amendment Act rules

headline: Delhi records worst air quality of the year AQI crosses 450
description: New Delhi's air quality plunged to severe levels with the Air Quality Index crossing 450 amid vehicular and industrial pollution

headline: India launches UPI payment system in 10 new countries
description: India's Unified Payments Interface has been expanded to 10 new countries enabling seamless cross-border digital transactions

headline: Mumbai local train services disrupted due to heavy monsoon rains
description: Heavy rainfall lashed Mumbai causing waterlogging on tracks and disruption of local train services across the city

headline: Government announces free electricity up to 300 units under PM Surya Ghar scheme
description: The central government rolled out the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana offering free electricity of up to 300 units per month

headline: India becomes world's third largest economy surpassing Japan
description: India has overtaken Japan to become the world's third largest economy according to IMF projections for 2025

headline: New education policy NEP 2020 fully implemented across all states
description: The National Education Policy 2020 has been fully implemented across all Indian states with focus on regional languages and skill development

headline: Chandrayaan-4 mission to be launched in 2026 says ISRO chief
description: ISRO chief announced that Chandrayaan-4 mission targeting lunar sample return will be launched in 2026

headline: India signs free trade agreement with European Union
description: India and the European Union signed a comprehensive free trade agreement after years of negotiations covering goods services and investments

headline: Earthquake of magnitude 5.8 hits Uttarakhand no casualties reported
description: A moderate earthquake measuring 5.8 on the Richter scale struck Uttarakhand in the early morning hours with no major casualties

headline: India wins 30 medals at Asian Games 2026 beats previous record
description: India achieved its best ever performance at the Asian Games 2026 with 30 medals including 10 gold

headline: Petrol diesel prices cut by Rs 5 per litre from today
description: The central government announced a Rs 5 per litre reduction in petrol and diesel prices effective from midnight

headline: CBSE board exam results 2025 declared class 10 pass percentage at 93%
description: The Central Board of Secondary Education declared Class 10 results with an overall pass percentage of 93%

headline: WHO declares India polio-free for 15 consecutive years
description: The World Health Organization certified India as polio-free for 15 consecutive years recognizing the country's vaccination efforts

headline: Aadhaar linked to 1.4 billion citizens government claims full saturation
description: The government announced that Aadhaar biometric identification has been successfully linked with 1.4 billion citizens achieving full saturation

headline: Rahul Gandhi addresses mega rally in Varanasi ahead of state elections
description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi held a massive election rally in Varanasi promising farm loan waivers and free healthcare

headline: Punjab farmers protest against agricultural land acquisition ordinance
description: Thousands of farmers in Punjab took to streets opposing a state government ordinance allowing industrial acquisition of agricultural land

headline: Bengaluru tech hub sees record startup funding of 12 billion dollars in 2024
description: Bengaluru's startup ecosystem attracted a record 12 billion dollars in venture capital funding in 2024 leading all Indian cities

headline: India's inflation falls to 4.1% lowest in 18 months
description: Consumer price inflation in India dropped to 4.1% in December 2024 the lowest reading in 18 months giving RBI room to cut rates

headline: Vijay Deverakonda starrer Arjun Reddy sequel confirmed for 2025 release
description: Telugu superstar Vijay Deverakonda confirmed that the sequel to Arjun Reddy is in production and will release in 2025

headline: Heavy snowfall in Himachal Pradesh 300 roads blocked
description: Incessant heavy snowfall in Himachal Pradesh blocked over 300 roads cutting off dozens of villages from the rest of the state

headline: IIT Delhi develops affordable water purifier that removes 99.9% pathogens
description: Researchers at IIT Delhi have developed a low-cost water purification device that eliminates 99.9% of harmful pathogens using nano-technology

headline: India's forex reserves touch all-time high of 720 billion dollars
description: India's foreign exchange reserves hit an all-time high of 720 billion dollars providing a robust buffer against global economic shocks

headline: Government launches Ayushman Bharat health card for senior citizens above 70
description: The central government extended the Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance scheme to all senior citizens above 70 years

headline: India's renewable energy capacity crosses 200 GW milestone
description: India reached a landmark 200 GW of installed renewable energy capacity powered by rapid growth in solar and wind energy projects

headline: Kejriwal announces Rs 2100 monthly allowance for Delhi women
description: Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal announced a monthly financial assistance of Rs 2100 for all women registered as voters in Delhi

headline: Heavy rains trigger landslides in Wayanad 18 dead dozens missing
description: Massive landslides triggered by torrential rains in Kerala's Wayanad district killed at least 18 people with dozens still missing

headline: Adani Group signs MoU for Rs 50000 crore investment in Rajasthan
description: Adani Group signed a memorandum of understanding with the Rajasthan government for Rs 50000 crore investment in green energy and infrastructure

headline: Centre hikes DA for central government employees by 4%
description: The Union Cabinet approved a 4% hike in Dearness Allowance for central government employees and pensioners effective from January 2025

headline: India's exports grow 12% in November crossing 40 billion dollars
description: India's merchandise exports grew 12% year-on-year in November 2024 crossing the 40 billion dollar mark driven by electronics and pharma

headline: Delhi Metro Phase 4 extension inaugurated connecting 27 new stations
description: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation inaugurated the Phase 4 extension adding 27 new stations across three corridors

headline: India ratifies global plastic treaty pledging to cut single-use plastic by 2030
description: India formally ratified the global plastic pollution treaty committing to a 50% cut in single-use plastic by 2030

headline: Tata Motors launches first all-electric truck for commercial use in India
description: Tata Motors launched India's first commercially viable all-electric heavy-duty truck targeting logistics and transportation companies

headline: NEET UG results: 24 students score perfect 720 out of 720
description: National Eligibility cum Entrance Test undergraduate results revealed 24 students achieved a perfect score of 720 out of 720 marks

headline: Virat Kohli announces retirement from T20 internationals after World Cup win
description: Veteran Indian cricketer Virat Kohli announced his retirement from T20 international cricket following India's World Cup victory

headline: Punjab government to give 3 marla plots free to landless families
description: The Punjab government announced a scheme to provide free 3 marla residential plots to all landless and homeless families in the state

headline: Haryana farmers get Rs 2000 per acre bonus for wheat crop procurement
description: The Haryana government announced a Rs 2000 per acre bonus for farmers selling wheat to government procurement agencies

headline: Amritsar airport to get international terminal expansion worth Rs 300 crore
description: The Amritsar Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport is set to get a major expansion of its international terminal at a cost of Rs 300 crore

headline: Himachal Pradesh tourism sees 40% jump in foreign visitors in 2024
description: Himachal Pradesh witnessed a 40% surge in foreign tourist arrivals in 2024 with Manali Shimla and Spiti being top destinations

headline: Chandigarh UT launches free wi-fi at all public spaces and parks
description: The Chandigarh UT administration launched free high-speed wi-fi connectivity at all public parks markets and government offices

headline: J&K government announces regularisation of daily wage workers after 10 years
description: The Jammu and Kashmir administration announced the regularisation of all daily wage government workers who have completed 10 years of service

headline: Punjab to open 1000 Aam Aadmi Clinics in rural areas
description: The Punjab government announced the establishment of 1000 Aam Aadmi Clinics in rural and semi-urban areas to provide free healthcare

headline: Ropar wetland declared Ramsar site international recognition for Punjab
description: The Ropar wetland in Punjab has been officially declared a Ramsar site by the international body recognizing its ecological significance

headline: Ludhiana Smart City project upgrade traffic lights with AI sensors
description: Ludhiana Smart City Mission upgraded 200 traffic signal junctions with AI-enabled adaptive sensors to reduce congestion

headline: SGPC approves Rs 500 crore development plan for Golden Temple complex
description: The Shiromani Gurdwara Parbandhak Committee approved a Rs 500 crore master plan for development and heritage conservation around the Golden Temple

headline: Haryana police arrest fake call centre running cyber fraud spanning 12 states
description: Haryana police busted a massive fake call centre operating cyber fraud targeting victims across 12 states with losses of over Rs 80 crore

headline: Punjab schools to introduce coding classes from class 6 onwards
description: The Punjab School Education Board announced mandatory coding and digital literacy classes from class 6 in all government schools

headline: HP government cancels 12 hydropower projects citing environment concerns
description: The Himachal Pradesh government cancelled 12 proposed hydropower projects in ecologically sensitive zones following environmental impact assessments

headline: Srinagar gets its first underground metro rail feasibility report approved
description: The feasibility report for Srinagar's first underground metro rail project has been approved by the central government paving way for construction

headline: Batch of 5000 Agniveer recruits completes training in Punjab regiment centre
description: The first batch of 5000 Agniveer recruits completed their four-year training at the Punjab Regiment Centre in Ramgarh

headline: Mohali emerges as India's second largest IT hub after Bengaluru
description: Greater Mohali in Punjab has emerged as India's second largest information technology hub with over 1500 registered IT companies

headline: Haryana government bans old petrol diesel vehicles older than 15 years in NCR
description: The Haryana government imposed a complete ban on all petrol and diesel vehicles older than 15 years in National Capital Region districts

headline: Ranjit Sagar Dam water level at 10-year high after good monsoon
description: The Ranjit Sagar Dam reservoir has reached a 10-year high water level following exceptionally good monsoon rains in the Himalayan catchment area

headline: Punjab PSEB 10th results 2025 girls outperform boys with 97.3% pass rate
description: Punjab School Education Board declared Class 10 results with girls achieving a remarkable 97.3% pass rate outperforming boys

headline: Uttarakhand announces strict rules for homestays in ecotourism zones
description: The Uttarakhand government announced strict licensing norms for homestays and guesthouses operating in designated ecotourism zones
